headline: Virgin Galactic's VSS Unity Completes First Spaceflight In Over 2 Years
summary: Virgin Galactic Holdings Inc's (NYSE: SPCE) VSS Unity spacecraft has completed its first spaceflight from New Mexico's Spaceport America, AP reports.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Home Depot, Nio, ViacomCBS And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included a new Warren Buffett stake and a big-box retailer.

headline: Elon Musk Takes Crypto's Side In 'Battle' With Fiat Money
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has suggested that he sides with cryptocurrencies in their war on fiat currencies such as the United States dollar.

headline: Amazon Pauses Construction at Connecticut Site After Nooses Found
summary: Nooses found at an Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) site in Windsor, Connecticut, are causing the company to halt construction there.

headline: Tesla Accused Of Firing Employee To Cover Up Copper Theft
summary: A lawsuit filed by a former Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) employee claims he was fired because of his reports that copper was being stolen from the company's battery plant near Reno, Nevada.

headline: Danielle Shay Says Microsoft Is One Of The Best Long-Term Growth Stocks
summary: Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT) is one of the best long-term growth stocks because of its consistency, Simpler Trading's Danielle Shay said Friday on CNBC's "Trading Nation."

headline: 'Halftime Report' Traders Share Their Thoughts On Target, Home Depot And More
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Halftime Report," Bryn Talkington answered a question from a viewer who wanted to know where to invest his $3,500.

headline: 'Trading Nation' Traders Are Bullish On Microsoft

headline: 'Trading Nation' Traders Share Their High-Beta Picks
summary: On CNBC's "Trading Nation," Danielle Shay of Simpler Trading and Craig Johnson of Piper Sandler spoke about high-beta stocks they would buy.

headline: Elon Musk Tweets: The true battle is between fiat & crypto. On balance, I support the latter.
